ghost_zones.methodology_note: PRD-3: Ghost flags require prior_avg >= 1.0 viol/day AND >= 5 active days in prior window. Zones with recent_active_days >= 1 are classed INTERMITTENT (not true enforcement blind spots). Only TRUE_GHOST zones (zero recent activity + strong prior signal) warrant immediate investigation.

model_info.approach: Blended LightGBM + CatBoost regression on lag/rolling daily violation features. NOTE: 7-day forecasting is a stretch feature; core deliverable is hotspot detection + impact quantification.

model_validation.interpretation: On the held-out 7-day window, the blended model was off by 2.1 violations/day/cell on average (MAE). RMSE of 6.7 penalises large errors more heavily. Lower values = better. These metrics are the appropriate correctness measure for this regression model (not classification accuracy or R²).

ghost_violation_flag.likely_cause: Sporadic recent activity — possible seasonal variation or irregular enforcement
